summary: Iteration 49 - Permission Audit Trail Feature COMPLETE. All backend and frontend features working correctly. Backend: GET /api/access/audit-trail returns denial logs with stats (top_denied_users, top_denied_permissions, total_denials). Frontend: Permissions page has 4 tabs for super_admin (Roles, User Permissions, Matrix, Audit Trail). Matrix tab shows 'API' badge for permissions with enforced:true flag. All 15 backend tests passed.

minor.issue: Console shows 'Mixed Content' warnings for http://...notifications/ endpoint being called from HTTPS page (not blocking functionality)

backend_audit_trail_tests.test_audit_trail_response_structure: PASS - stats with total_denials, top_denied_users, top_denied_permissions
backend_audit_trail_tests.test_audit_trail_logs_structure: PASS - logs have user_email, user_role, required_permissions, timestamp, action

frontend_permissions_page.super_admin_tabs: PASS - 4 tabs visible (Roles, User Permissions, Matrix, Audit Trail)
frontend_permissions_page.admin_tabs: PASS - 2 tabs visible (Roles, User Permissions) - Matrix and Audit Trail hidden
frontend_permissions_page.audit_trail_stats_cards: PASS - Total Denials, Top Blocked Users, Most Blocked Permissions cards visible
frontend_permissions_page.audit_trail_table: PASS - Time, User, Role, Required Permissions columns with 26 rows of data
frontend_permissions_page.matrix_api_badge: PASS - API badges visible next to enforced permissions (e.g., Create Hotels, Edit Hotels, Delete Hotels, Manage Rooms)

features_verified.backend_permission_denial_logging: WORKING - _log_permission_denial called in require_permission and require_any_permission on denial
features_verified.backend_audit_trail_endpoint: WORKING - GET /api/access/audit-trail with pagination, filtering, stats aggregation
features_verified.frontend_4_tabs_for_super_admin: WORKING - Roles, User Permissions, Matrix, Audit Trail tabs
features_verified.frontend_2_tabs_for_admin: WORKING - Roles, User Permissions (Matrix and Audit Trail hidden)
features_verified.frontend_audit_trail_display: WORKING - Stats cards + table with denial logs
features_verified.frontend_matrix_api_badge: WORKING - Green 'API' badge shown for permissions with enforced:true
features_verified.permission_modules_updated: WORKING - 26 modules with 133 permissions in frontend

critical_code_review_comments: Permission audit trail correctly logs denials to MongoDB 'permission_audit_trail' collection
Audit trail endpoint requires access.view_permissions - correctly restricts to super_admin
Frontend conditionally renders Matrix and Audit Trail tabs based on isSuperAdmin check
API badges correctly rendered for permissions with enforced:true flag using emerald color theme
ADMIN_ASSIGNABLE_PERMISSIONS updated with all new permission codes from modules
seed_data_creation: Permission denials logged during testing (~30 denials in permission_audit_trail collection)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 verified Permission Audit Trail feature. Backend /api/access/audit-trail endpoint working with stats aggregation. Frontend Permissions page has 4 tabs for super_admin (only 2 for regular admin). Matrix tab shows API badges for enforced permissions. 26 permission modules with 133 permissions defined.
